start:
👋 Welcome!

🎬 Send me a video, and I’ll quickly extract the audio for you — simple, fast, and reliable.

One-time purchase.
Unlimited uploads and conversions — forever.
too-large: 💎 ⚠️ File too large This video exceeds the free limit ({} MB). Use 💎 1 diamond or upgrade to Premium.
large-used: 💎 1 diamond used Large file upload unlocked.
daily-limit: ⛔ Daily limit reached You’ve used all free conversions for today. Use a diamond or buy more below.
congrats: 🎉 Success! {} diamonds have been added to your account.
congrats-lifetime: 🎉 Lifetime Premium Activated! You now have unlimited access forever.
subscribe: 🔔 Please subscribe to our channel to continue using the bot.
not-sub: ❌ You need to subscribe to the channel before you can use the bot. Please join and try again!
thank-sub: ✅ Thank you for subscribing! You can now send a video file, and I’ll extract the audio for you.
help-text: 🆘 How It Works 1️⃣ Send a video file 2️⃣ Wait while we extract the audio 3️⃣ Download and enjoy 💎 Need more power? Use diamonds for unlimited access and large files. Still need help? Just ask!
